title: Verify Trial Corner Hub - Hero Section UI
description: Test the UI elements of the Hero section in the Trial Corner for an active trial.
preconditions: User has an active trial and is in the Trial Corner cohort

steps.description: 1. Navigate to the Trial Corner hub.
2. Observe the top section of the screen.

expected_result: The screen displays 'Your ₹1 trial is active.' and the correct number of 'Remaining Days' for the trial.
